cover.title: what broke running our content on an agent fleet
cover.sub: Three real failures this week. None were the model's fault, all were coordination.

pairs.broke: Raw widget syntax shipped live. The pipeline dropped blocks silently.
pairs.fix: A render gate that fails closed on unknown blocks. No silent drops.

pairs.broke: Agents wrote from the old positioning, in parallel. Same wrong answer, everywhere.
pairs.fix: One canonical positioning doc the fleet reads first, before it writes.

pairs.broke: 18 widgets built, 0 emitted. The pipeline couldn't reach them.
pairs.fix: Wire the emitter, add a smoke test before publish. Build less, ship what works.

slides.title: the pattern
slides.body: Every failure was a coordination gap, not a model limit. Serve the fleet one current, canonical source and most of these stop happening.

data.label: review tax ≈ share of agent reads

cta.title: we post the misses too
cta.sub: Real artifacts beat polished claims. Follow the build.

source: build in public · our own run
